hooks.command: python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get("tool_input",{}).get("file_path",""); (sys.stderr.write("BLOCKED: server/core/ is HUMAN ONLY (Manual Brain rule). See CLAUDE.md.\n"), sys.exit(2)) if "server/core/" in p else sys.exit(0)'
[ -d client/ui/node_modules ] && npm --prefix client/ui run typecheck 2>&1 | tail -20 || echo 'client/ui/node_modules missing — skipping typecheck. Run: npm --prefix client/ui install'
